speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! You've got a great eye — this 2018 Camry LE is one of the cleanest we've had on the lot in months. Only 78,000 miles, which is nothing for a Toyota, and it just came back from a full service inspection. We're asking $18,495, which is a steal for what you're getting — reliable, fuel-efficient, and ready to drive home today. Want to take it for a spin?

speaker: buyer

args.message: That sounds great! Before I take it for a spin, has this Camry been in any accidents?

text: That sounds great! Before I take it for a spin, has this Camry been in any accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great question — and I love that you're doing your due diligence! No, this Camry has a clean title and no accident history on the CarFax. It's been a one-owner vehicle, well cared for, mostly highway miles from what we can tell. That's exactly why Toyotas hold their value so well — people take care of them because they know they'll last. So, ready to see how she drives?

text: That's good to hear about the clean history. I'm definitely interested. I'd like to offer $18,200.

speaker: seller

args.message: I appreciate the offer! You're clearly serious, and I respect that. Here's the thing — I just saw a 2018 Camry LE with 85,000 miles go for $18,600 at auction last week, and that one didn't have the service history this one does. I can come down a little to $18,350 because I want to make this happen for you today, but that's really the best I can do on a car this clean. What do you say?
